basic_details.job_title: UPCISB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 2,085 Clerk, Junior Manager and More Vacancies
basic_details.total_vacancies: Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier (Banking Assistant/Clerical Staff), Assistant Manager (Computer/General), Assistant/Typist, Assistant/Stenographer, Accountant, Assistant Accountant, Accounting Clerk, Junior Assistant, Stenographer, Junior Engineer, Assistant Engineer (Civil/Electrical).
basic_details.job_type: Permanent posts under various Co-operative Banks and Co-operative Federations in Uttar Pradesh.
basic_details.short_information: UP Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026 offers 2085 permanent vacancies across banking and technical posts in Uttar Pradesh. Check key highlights like posts, application mode, and official details in this overview.

application_fee.details: Application fee is to be paid only through online mode via debit card, credit card, internet banking, UPI, IMPS, cash card or mobile wallet during 25 April 2026 to 15 May 2026. Bank transaction charges for payment of application fee will be borne by the candidate and the fee once paid is non-refundable.

age_limit.details: The age limit to apply for UPCISB Clerk, Junior Manager and More Posts Recruitment 2026 is 21 to 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved category candidates as per government rules.

qualification.details: Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India.

category_wise_vacancy.Institution: U.P. State Construction Co-operative Federation Limited

salary_details.details: The notification provides detailed pay scales for each post, such as specific minimum and maximum pay in the respective pay bands for Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier, Assistant Manager, Accountant, Junior Engineer, Assistant Engineer and other posts. Pay scales differ institution-wise and post-wise (for example, different pay bands for Junior Manager in different District Co-operative Banks), and all posts are permanent with regular pay as per the respective co-operative institution’s rules.

selection_process: The selection process consists of an online Preliminary Examination (if required) and a Main Examination conducted by UPCISB. Based on the Preliminary Exam
up to 15 times the number of vacancies will be shortlisted for the Main Exam. On the basis of Main Exam result
up to 3 times the number of posts will be called for interview (where applicable) and up to 5 times the number of posts for proficiency test
wherever prescribed. Both Preliminary and Main examinations will be objective-type online tests with multiple choice questions and negative marking of 1/4 mark for each wrong answer.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the official website of U.P. Co-operative Institutional Service Board: https://www.upcisb.upsdc.gov.in.
First, complete “New Registration” by entering name, contact details and email ID to generate a registration number and password.

Fill in the online application form carefully using the “Save and Next” option, upload scanned photograph, signature, left-hand thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per the prescribed specifications.
Pay the application fee through the integrated payment gateway, ensure e-Receipt generation, and take a printout of the final submitted application form and fee receipt for future reference.
important_instructions: Candidates must thoroughly read and understand all instructions in the advertisement before filling the online application form. The photograph, signature, thumb impression and handwritten declaration must be clear and as per the prescribed size and format, otherwise the application may be rejected. No change is permitted in key details after clicking on “Complete Registration”, so all information (name, father’s name, etc.) must match official certificates. Candidates should keep their registered email ID and mobile number active till completion of the recruitment process for receiving admit card and other communication from UPCISB. Minimum efficiency standard (qualifying marks) and negative marking rules in the exam must be noted carefully, as incorrect answers will attract penalty.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in UPCISB Recruitment 2026 and for which posts?
faq.answer: U.P. Co‑operative Institutional Service Board has announced 2085 permanent vacancies for Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier (Banking Assistant/Clerical Staff), Assistant Manager (Computer/General), Assistant/Typist, Assistant/Stenographer, Accountant, Assistant Accountant, Accounting Clerk, Junior Assistant, Stenographer, Junior Engineer and Assistant Engineer (Civil/Electrical) across District Co‑operative Banks and Co‑operative Federations in Uttar Pradesh.

faq.question: Q2. What are the application dates for UP Cooperative Bank (UPCISB) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application and fee payment window is from 25 April 2026 to 15 May 2026, as notified under Advertisement No. A‑2/G.R./2026 on the official portal upcisb.upsdc.gov.in.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for UPCISB Various Posts Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be 21 to 40 years as on 01 January 2026 (i.e., born between 01.01.1986 and 01.01.2005), with relaxations: +5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Sports persons/UP Govt employees (max 45 years), Divyangjan (PwD) up to 55 years (15‑year relaxation), and Ex‑servicemen: service period + 3 years as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the main educational qualifications for Manager posts?
faq.answer: Manager (Category‑1): Typically Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce with 55% marks or Bachelor’s with Economics/Maths/Statistics (55%) plus ‘O’ Level computer certificate, or professional qualifications like B.Tech/B.E. (CS/IT), BCA, MCA, BBA/MBA (Banking/Finance/HR), or full‑time PG in Banking/Finance/HR with required percentage.

faq.question: Q5. What are the qualifications for Accountant posts?
faq.answer: Accountant: B.Com or PG Diploma in Accountancy from a recognised institute plus ‘O’ Level Diploma in Computer Operation from a Government‑recognised institute.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for UPCISB Various Posts 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500 for UR/OBC/EWS candidates and ₹250 for SC/ST candidates, payable online only via debit card, credit card, net banking, UPI, IMPS, cash card or mobile wallet; bank charges are borne by candidates and fee is non‑refundable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process and exam pattern for UPCISB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online Preliminary Exam (if conducted) and Main Exam, both objective‑type MCQs with ¼ negative marking per wrong answer. Based on Prelims, up to 15 times the vacancies are called for Mains; from Mains, up to 3 times the posts for interview (where applicable) and up to 5 times for proficiency tests (like typing/stenography) wherever prescribed. Final selection depends on Main Exam + Interview/Proficiency Test as per post.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for UP Cooperative Bank (UPCISB) 2085 Vacancy 2026?
faq.answer: Visit upcisb.upsdc.gov.in, click on the relevant UPCISB Recruitment 2026 link, complete New Registration (name, contact, email), fill the application form using “Save & Next”, upload scanned photograph, signature, left thumb impression and handwritten declaration in the prescribed sizes, pay the fee via integrated gateway, and finally submit and print the application and e‑receipt for reference.
